name_en: 24B New Bowling Bag Denim, front chain with a tight grommet, plus a large interior pocket. A simple yet trendy style that remains at the forefront of fashion for a long time. High usage frequency, not only suitable for travel but also very practical and easy to match for daily wear.
name_cn:
24B New Bowling Bag Denim, front chain with a tight grommet, plus a large interior pocket. A simple yet trendy style that remains at the forefront of fashion for a long time. High usage frequency, not only suitable for travel but also very practical and easy to match for daily wear.
Model: AS4905
Size: 21-33-15
